entities.name: COMT GG (Warrior Variant)
entities.context: Genetic variant indicating fast dopamine clearance, associated with strong performance under pressure but harder recovery from intense exercise

entities.name: Dopamine Clearance
entities.context: Neurochemical process; fast clearance linked to COMT GG enables race-day pressure performance

entities.name: Interval Training
entities.context: 20% interval days hit COMT GG carriers harder than most people; recovery must be respected

entities.name: Resting Heart Rate
entities.context: Biomarker tracked via Fitbit; elevation of 5+ BPM above baseline signals need for extended recovery before next interval session

entities.name: Fitbit
entities.context: Wearable device used to monitor resting HR as a recovery readiness indicator

entities.name: 10K Race
entities.context: Target race event; COMT GG variant is advantageous for race-day pressure performance

entities.name: Recovery Protocol
entities.context: COMT GG carriers need deliberate recovery respect — extended rest when HR elevates above baseline

relationships.context: COMT GG causes fast dopamine clearance, the mechanism behind pressure performance advantage
Warrior variant means interval days impose heavier systemic load requiring extra recovery
Fast dopamine clearance is advantageous for race-day pressure situations
HR elevation of 5+ BPM above baseline triggers extended recovery before next interval
Fitbit is the device used to track resting HR for recovery readiness
V is recovery-conscious about this genetic trait and respects its trade-offs in training
V uses Fitbit to monitor resting HR as a recovery decision tool
